creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Andrew Smith from comment #2)
According to the JRuby folks I talked to 1.7.x is End of Life at the end of the year, so I thought the quarterly branch should cover the need for 1.7.x until then and there wouldn't be a need for separate 1.7.x and 9.x ports. Sound OK?
